title: Morphodynamics_of_human_early_brain_organoid_development_Jain_Gut_2025_processed_anndata
author: Gut, Gilles
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains processed single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) data in the form of Seurat objects, generated for the manuscript  "Morphodynamics of human early brain organoid development."  The corresponding raw sequencing data is publicly available through ArrayExpress under accession number:  E-MTAB-15057 . All analysis code and parameters used in the study are available on GitHub at  https://github.com/quadbio/morphodynamics_human_brain_organoid .
